note: Funding routes that fit a neutral, non-dilutive, no-token DePIN bureau. Non-dilutive options are listed first. Always open the program page for the current round + deadline before applying — amounts and cadence change.

groups.label: Retroactive / public goods — best fit (non-dilutive, rewards shipped work)

items.name: Gitcoin Grants (Quadratic Funding rounds)
items.fit: Open-source public-goods rounds. Your public Sybil reads + offline verifier fit the infra/tooling and security categories. Pairs with your existing Giveth page.

items.name: Optimism Retro Funding (RetroPGF)
items.fit: Rewards already-shipped tooling that benefits the ecosystem. A neutral verifier + reproducible reports qualify as infra/tooling. Base contributes to this collective too.

items.name: Octant (Golem) public goods
items.fit: Quarterly public-goods funding for projects with demonstrable impact. Neutral DePIN integrity tooling is a clean public-good narrative.

items.name: Giveth (you are already listed)
items.fit: Keep the project page fresh with the latest findings; line it up with Gitcoin rounds so a campaign hits both at once.

items.name: Base (Coinbase) builder grants
items.fit: Strongest narrative fit: Base Verify is anti-Sybil at the SOCIAL layer; GETKINETIK is anti-Sybil at the DEVICE layer — a direct complement, not a competitor.

items.name: Solana Foundation grants
items.fit: Helium, Hivemapper and Natix are Solana-based. A neutral cross-network Sybil read of Solana DePIN is a strong ecosystem-level pitch.

items.name: Ethereum Foundation ESP
items.fit: Funds open-source infra, tooling and research. A public verifier + methodology fits ESP's neutral-infrastructure mandate.

items.name: Arbitrum Foundation grants
items.fit: Infra/tooling grants plus an audit-subsidy track relevant to a signature verifier.

items.name: ETHGlobal
items.fit: Ship the verify-device demo against DePIN/security sponsor bounties. Wins = prize cash + face time with protocol teams. Doubles as distribution.

items.name: Colosseum (Solana hackathons)
items.fit: Solana DePIN track — directly your audited networks. Top projects get follow-on funding access.

items.name: DoraHacks
items.fit: Recurring DePIN and infra quests/bounties; low overhead to enter with an existing demo.

items.name: Encode Club
items.fit: Frequent DePIN/AI hackathons and education programs with bounties and mentor access.

groups.label: DePIN funds & accelerators — DILUTIVE (equity/token; conflicts with no-token stance — listed for completeness)

items.name: Borderless Capital
items.fit: DePIN-focused; co-led ROVR's round with GEODNET, so warm to your exact space. Dilutive (equity/token) — only if you change the non-dilutive plan.

items.name: Escape Velocity (EV3)
items.fit: DePIN-native early-stage fund. Dilutive — keep for context, not aligned with the public-good route.

items.name: Outlier Ventures (Base Camp)
items.fit: DePIN accelerator cohorts with mentorship + demo day. Takes a token warrant (partly dilutive).
